title: oenothera prismatica var. quadrivulnera
intro: Oenothera prismatica var. quadrivulnera, also known as Evening Primrose, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Onagraceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its rich content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including eczema, arthritis, and menopausal symptoms, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote hormone balance. Evening Primrose can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or capsule, and is often used as a dietary supplement to support overall health and wellness.
